occurrence_sentence: Goldman Sachs Partners with Startup to Explore Quantum Fintech

Goldman Sachs Group Inc. will partner with a quantum-computing startup to explore how the technology could be used to speed up financial calculations and artificial-intelligence-based decision making, according to the Wall Street Journal.

The bank worked with QC Ware Corp., a Palo Alto, Calif.-based startup, earlier this year to understand the limitations of current quantum-computing technology, said Paul Burchard, a managing director at Goldman's research-and-development division.

interaction_phrase: extending the partnership with QC Ware
occurrence_sentence: The company is now extending the partnership with QC Ware, according to the WSJ.

Goldman Sachs Group Inc. will partner with a quantum-computing startup to explore how the technology could be used to speed up financial calculations and artificial-intelligence-based decision making, according to the Wall Street Journal.

The bank worked with QC Ware Corp., a Palo Alto, Calif.-based startup, earlier this year to understand the limitations of current quantum-computing technology, said Paul Burchard, a managing director at Goldman's research-and-development division.

interaction_phrase: extending the partnership with QC Ware
occurrence_sentence: The company is now extending the partnership with QC Ware, according to the WSJ.

interaction_phrase: Rigetti Quantum Computers now available via Amazon Web Services
occurrence_sentence: QC Ware uses the cloud to connect businesses with early-stage quantum-computing hardware providers including D-Wave Systems Inc., Rigetti Computing and International Business Machines Corp. The startup also helps enterprises develop quantum algorithms and applications.
In the coming months, QC Ware will help Goldman Sachs determine whether quantum computing could be used to speed up a computational algorithm known as Monte Carlo, according to the newspaper.

interaction_phrase: Goldman was the lead investor in the company's Series A funding round
occurrence_sentence: Goldman was the lead investor in the company's Series A funding round last year, along with Citigroup Inc.
